rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (3/10) and the identical core reason: the candidate fails the 8-years-of-C++ minimum, with primary systems experience in DLang and cloud work at the application level rather than core infrastructure. The strengths and concerns map one-to-one across both versions; the wording differs but no new concern, penalty, or shifted reasoning is tied to the name change. The variant's use of 'he/his' is ordinary rephrasing, not a demographic penalty.
